app.rdg: 1. Stab kwi Lekopilmasio?
1. stab k ∑i Lekopilmasio.
1. What is confirmation?
Tih√Ælh Lakopilmasio dcho Sakrema dahu kudadchelh ku Sent-Ospli;
ti îi…¨ Lakopilmasio d…ôcÃå'u î Sakrema d…ôx ∑k ∑…ôdadch…ô…¨ k ∑i Sent-Ospli;
Confirmation is a sacrament whereby we receive the Holy Ghost;
al tih√Ælh Lekopilmasio sasralchelh ata gwalh kwerkru kretia sral.
îal ti îi…¨ l…ôkopilmasio s…ôsxÃåalcÃå…ô…¨ î…ô t…ô g ∑…ô…¨ q ∑iq º ∑ kretia sxÃåal.
With confirmation we are numbered among the number of powerful Christians.
2. Stab tihilh Lekstlemasio?
2. stab ti îi…¨ Lekstlemasio.
2. What is the extreme unction?
Tih√Ælh Lekstlemasio dcho Sakrema, tlhdahu kwawhatobs gwalh tib asralh kretia sele eku tsokwabs.
ti îi…¨ l…ôkstl…ômasio d…ôcÃå'u î sakr…ôma , …¨…ôd…ôx ∑ k ∑ax ∑at…ôbs g ∑…ô…¨ tib î…ôsxÃå…ô…¨ kretia sh…ôli î îi k ∑i c ºuk º ∑…ôbs.
The extreme unction is a sacrament that is received by a very sick Christian's soul and body.
3. Stab tihilh Lordl?
3. stab ti îi…¨ Lordl.
3. What is the order?
Tih√Ælh Lordl dcho Sakrema sahuchelh leple eku ba sahuchelhab leple.
ti îi…¨ Lordl d…ôcÃå'u î Sakrema s…ôx ∑cÃå…ô…¨ leple îi k ∑i b…ôs…ôx ∑cÃå…ô…¨…ôb leple.
The order is a sacrament where we ?? a priest and we are ??? by the priest.
4. Stab tihilh Lemaliash?
4. stab ti îi…¨ Lemaliash.
4. What is mariage?
Tih√Ælh Lemaliash dcho Sakrema tlhdahu krekr aku stobsh eku sladai tlhdahu hois halh.
ti îi…¨ Lemaliash d…ôcÃå'u î Sakrema t…¨d…ôx ∑ q ∑iq º ∑ î…ô k ∑i stubsÃå îi k ∑i s…¨ad…ôy î t…¨d…ôx ∑ huys ha î…¨.
5. Asared ku tlus kwebitsut aku stobsh eku sladai dhual Lemaliash?
5. î…ôs î…ôxÃåid k ∑i …¨usq ∑ibicut î…ô k ∑i stubsÃå îi k ∑i s…¨aday dx ∑ îal Lemaliash.
5. How do a man and a woman prepare for marriage?
Asista ate ku tlus kwebitsut aku stobsh eku sladai dhual Lemaliash.
î…ôsist…ô î î…ô ti k ∑i …¨usq ∑ibicut î…ô k ∑i stubsÃå îi k ∑i s…¨aday dx ∑ îal Lemaliash.
This is how a man and a woman prepare for marriage.
Zihu ku tlus haidhus halgwa gula tlo tleldhu halgwa gwalh Sherk-Siam sgwadgwad.
d·∂ªix ∑ k ∑i …¨ushaydx ∑s h…ôlg ∑…ô g ∑…ôl…ô…¨u…¨ildx ∑ h…ôlg ∑…ô gw…ô…¨ sÃå…ôq si îab sg ∑adg ∑ad.
Lakrahu gwa tla whobed aku tsoku ku boku sa alalus ;
laksÃåahu_ gwa_ tla_wh ∑b…ôd_ î…ô k ∑i c…ôk ∑ k ∑i b…ôk º ∑ sa î îalalus ;
al slelels whatlels, abil aku tskwadads halgwa gwa tla hoyud halgwa whe;
îal sl…ôl…ôls_ whatl…ôls, î…ôbil º î…ô k ∑i d·∂ª…ôk º ∑adads h…ôlg ∑…ô g ∑…ô…¨uhuyud h…ôlg ∑…ô wh…ô;
al sbosatlels, halh kwi gwas ors halgwa dhual rarasmilalam.
îal sbuusa…¨ils, ha î…¨ k ∑i g ∑…ôs îuxÃå ∑s h…ôlg ∑…ô dx ∑ îal xÃåaxÃåa sbil º îallah…ôb.
6: Abil o halh kretia stobsh eku sladai
6. î…ôbil º îu ha î…¨ kretia stubsÃå îi k ∑i s…¨aday
6. Are they good Christian men and women,
gula gwa chalad halgwa gwalh Sherk-Siam schelhrachem eku gwalh leglis schelhrachem?
g ∑…ôl g ∑…ôcÃåalad h…ôlg ∑…ô gw…ô…¨ sÃå…ôq si îab scÃå…ô…¨xÃå…ôcÃå…ôb îi k ∑i g ∑…ô…¨ l…ôglis scÃå…ô…¨xÃå…ôcÃå…ôb.
if they go according to the commandment of God, and the commandment of the church,
E, abil halh kretia stobsh eku sladai,
îi, î…ôbil º ha î…¨ kretia stubsÃå îi k ∑i s…¨aday,
Yes, if they are good Christian men and women,
gula gwa chalad halgwa gwalh Sherk-Siam schelhrachem, eku gwalh leglis schelhrachem.
g ∑…ôla g ∑…ôcÃåalad h…ôlg ∑…ô g ∑…ô…¨ sÃå…ôq si îab scÃå…ô…¨xÃå…ôcÃå…ôb, îi k ∑i g ∑…ô…¨ l…ôglis scÃå…ô…¨xÃå…ôcÃå…ôb.
and they go according to the commandment of God, and the commandment of the church.
7. Asared kwi tlo alalus ata tsahadilh asmalie?
7. î…ôs î…ôxÃåid k ∑i …¨u îalalus î…ô t…ô caadi…¨ î…ôsmalie.
Tih√Ælh asmalie halgwa, tlo chalad halgwa gwalh halh kretia alalus,
ti îi…¨ î…ôsmalie h…ôlg ∑…ô, …¨ucÃåalad h…ôlg ∑…ô g ∑…ô…¨ ha î…¨ kretia îalalus,
their marriage will bring them to good christian's circumstance
tlo ratltagwalb halgwa, tlo kwawhat gwalh halgwa dhual ku tsokwabs eku dhual seles halgwa.
…¨uxÃåa∆õ'tag ∑…ôl…ôb h…ôlg ∑…ô, …¨uk ∑ax ∑at g ∑…ô…¨ h…ôlg ∑…ô dx ∑ îal k ∑i c ºuk º ∑…ôbs îi k ∑i dx ∑ îal sh…ôli îs h…ôlg ∑…ô.
Whe la patam kwi tlus balits ku tus aldakrabs halgwa.
x ∑i î l…ôp…ô(d)tab k ∑i …¨usbalyic k ∑i tus îaldaq…ôbs h…ôlg ∑…ô.
They will not ever forget the things that were promised to them.
Abil tlo chelhtob beda halgwa a kwi Sherk-Siam gula halh kwi tlsashuts halgwa,
î…ôbil º …¨ucÃå…ô…¨t…ôbb…ôda î h…ôlg ∑…ô î…ô k ∑i sÃå…ôq si îab g ∑…ôl ha î…¨ k ∑i …¨us…ôshuyuc h…ôlg ∑…ô,
if they make children unto God then they will do good by
ku tlo bedas halgwa dhual kwi gwa dahu orthus halgwa duhsherk.
k ∑i …¨ub…ôda îs h…ôlg ∑…ô dx ∑ îal k ∑i g ∑…ôd…ôx ∑ îuxÃå ∑tx ∑s h…ôlg ∑…ô dx ∑ssÃå…ôq.
their future children so that they may ascend to heaven.
